Class StorageChest

java.lang.Object
simcli.world.interactables.StorageChest
All Implemented Interfaces:
Container, Interactable
public class StorageChest extends Object implements Interactable, Container
A storage container placed in the world where a Sim can deposit Items from their personal inventory for later retrieval.

    • interact

      public void interact(Sim sim, Scanner scanner, TimeManager timeManager) throws SimulationException
      Description copied from interface: Interactable
      Performs the interaction between the Sim and this object.
      Specified by:
      interact in interface Interactable
      Parameters:
      sim - the Sim performing the interaction.
      scanner - for reading follow-up user input if needed.
      timeManager - the simulation clock (for time-dependent actions).
      Throws:
      SimulationException - if game rules prevent the interaction.

      public String getObjectName()
      Description copied from interface: Interactable
      Returns the display name of this interactable object.

      Returns:
      the object's name (e.g. "Bed", "Fridge").
